title: Steam Empire
description: A steampunk-themed Minecraft modpack with 120+ mods. Build, explore, and rule in a world of steam and gears. Multiplayer project starting August 17th, 2025
body:
# Steam Empire
Step into Steam Empire, a sprawling modpack with over 120 carefully selected mods that blend steampunk aesthetics, engineering marvels, and immersive exploration. Build vast factories, conquer the skies, and forge your empire in a world powered by steam, gears, and ambition.

**Official Projekt**
Our multiplayer project launches on **August 17th, 2025** – and you can be part of it!
Join our community and apply to play via our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ABxvwdQS)

**Are you ready to rise as the next ruler of the Steam Empire?**
